all.en: This notice confirms that our ISO certification renewal audit is now scheduled.
all.zh: 本通知確認我方 ISO 認證續證稽核已正式排定。

all.en: External auditors will visit the main facility from June third through June seventh.
all.zh: 外部稽核員將自六月三日至六月七日蒅訪主要廠區。

all.en: The scope covers quality management standards across manufacturing and logistics.
all.zh: 稽核範圍涵蓋製造與物流的品質管理標準。

all.en: All department leaders are expected to prepare relevant process documentation.
all.zh: 所有部門主管應準備相關流程文件以備查核。

all.en: Procedure manuals must reflect the latest revisions implemented this year.
all.zh: 作業手冊須反映本年度導入的最新修訂內容。

all.en: Internal audit findings from January and March should be fully closed by then.
all.zh: 一月與三月內部稽核發現事項應於該時前完全結案。

all.en: Corrective action records require evidence of root cause analysis and follow up.
all.zh: 矯正措施紀錄需有根本原因分析與後續追蹤佐證。

all.en: Calibration certificates for measurement equipment must remain valid and accessible.
all.zh: 量測設備校驗證書須維持有效並可隨時調閱。

all.en: Training records for new operators should be updated within the digital system.
all.zh: 新進操作人員的訓練紀錄應於電子系統中更新。

all.en: Supplier qualification files will be reviewed for high risk material categories.
all.zh: 高風險物料類別的供應商評鑑檔案將接受審閱。

all.en: Customer complaint logs and response records will also be examined in detail.
all.zh: 客戶投訴紀錄與回應檔案亦將被詳細檢視。

all.en: Management review meeting minutes from the past twelve months are required.
all.zh: 過去十二個月的管理審查會議紀錄亦為必要文件。

all.en: The opening meeting is scheduled for nine in the morning on the first audit day.
all.zh: 開場會議排定於稽核首日上午九點舉行。

all.en: Department interviews will follow throughout the week according to a fixed agenda.
all.zh: 部門訪談將於整週依固定議程進行。

all.en: Interviewees should answer questions clearly and reference documented procedures.
all.zh: 受訪者應清楚回答問題並引用書面程序內容。

all.en: Sample testing may occur on the production floor during regular shift hours.
all.zh: 取樣測試可能於正常班別時段在生產現場執行。

all.en: Please ensure work areas remain clean and safety signage is properly displayed.
all.zh: 請確保工作區整潔，且安全標示妥善張貼。

all.en: The closing meeting will summarize observations and any minor or major findings.
all.zh: 閉場會議將彙整觀察事項及任何輕微或重大發現。

all.en: Final certification reports are expected within three weeks after the visit.
all.zh: 最終認證報告預計於蒅訪後三週內提供。

all.en: Any nonconformities must be addressed through a formal corrective action plan.
all.zh: 任何不符合事項須透過正式矯正措施計畫處理。

all.en: Successful renewal extends our certification status for another three year cycle.
all.zh: 順利續證將使我方認證狀態再延長一個三年週期。

all.en: This achievement supports our reputation with global customers and partners.
all.zh: 此項成就有助於提升我方在全球客戶與夥伴間的信譽。

all.en: Please direct questions to the quality assurance office before the audit begins.
all.zh: 如有疑問，請於稽核開始前洽詢品質保證辦公室。

all.en: Thank you for your continued dedication to operational excellence and compliance.
all.zh: 感謝您持續致力於營運卓越與合規。

all.en: Pre audit walk throughs will be conducted by internal auditors next Wednesday.
all.zh: 內部稽核員將於下週三進行稽核前現場走訪。

all.en: A readiness checklist has been distributed to every department head this morning.
all.zh: 稽核準備檢查清單已於今晨分發至各部門主管。

all.en: Document control will issue a freeze on procedure updates one week before the audit.
all.zh: 文件管制將於稽核前一週對程序更新實施凍結。

all.en: Translators will be available to support auditors during interviews when needed.
all.zh: 訪談期間將安排翻譯人員協助稽核員。

all.en: A dedicated audit room has been reserved with secure storage for sensitive records.
all.zh: 已預留專屬稽核會議室並備有機密紀錄安全保管設施。

all.en: Daily debriefs will be held at five in the afternoon during the audit week.
all.zh: 稽核週每日下午五點將舉行當日匯報會議。

all.en: Senior leadership commits to making decisions promptly on any findings raised.
all.zh: 高階主管承諾就所有提出之發現迅速做出決策。

all.en: Refreshments and lunch arrangements have been confirmed by the facilities team.
all.zh: 餐飲與午餐安排已由總務團隊確認。

all.en: All staff are encouraged to greet auditors politely and answer questions honestly.
all.zh: 全體同仁應禮貌迎接稽核員並誠實答覆問題。

all.en: Let us approach this audit as an opportunity to showcase our continuous improvement.
all.zh: 讓我們以此次稽核為機會，展現我們持續改善的成果。

all.en: All process owners must verify that revision dates appear on every controlled document.
all.zh: 所有流程負責人須確認每份受控文件皆標示修訂日期。

all.en: Records of management of change activities should be filed by program code.
all.zh: 變更管理活動紀錄應依專案代碼歸檔。

all.en: Risk registers will be reviewed at the opening meeting to align on key focus areas.
all.zh: 開場會議將檢視風險登錄表以就重點領域達成共識。

all.en: Auditors may request to interview shop floor operators during regular shift hours.
all.zh: 稽核員可能於正常班別時段要求訪談現場作業員。

all.en: Operators should describe how they apply procedures in their daily work routines.
all.zh: 作業員應說明其於日常作業中如何運用程序。

all.en: Any uncertain answers should be deferred politely to the appropriate process owner.
all.zh: 如有任何不確定的回答，應禮貌地轉介給合適的流程負責人。

all.en: Photographs and screen captures may be requested only with management approval.
all.zh: 如需拍照或截圖，須先取得管理階層核可。

all.en: All personal data shown to auditors must be redacted in line with privacy policies.
all.zh: 提供予稽核員的所有個人資料須依個資政策進行遮蔽。

all.en: A standby technical team will be available to answer detailed system questions.
all.zh: 技術後援團隊將待命回應系統相關詳細問題。

all.en: We trust everyone will represent the company with professionalism and confidence.
all.zh: 相信全體同仁將以專業與自信代表公司。

all.en: Honestly, the night before my first ISO interview I barely slept, but it turned out completely fine.
all.zh: 老實說我第一次接受 ISO 訪談的前一晚幾乎沒睡，結果根本沒事。

all.en: My department head treated us all to lunch after the closing meeting confirmed no major findings.
all.zh: 閉場會議確認無重大發現後，我們主任請整組人吃了午餐。

all.en: Don't try to dodge questions you don't know, just say you'll check with the process owner and follow up.
all.zh: 不懂的問題別硬答，直接說會去問流程負責人再回覆就好。

all.en: I keep a folder of every revision note on my desk so I can quickly answer any version control question.
all.zh: 我桌上有一個資料夾收藏每次修訂紀錄，遇到版本管控問題就能秒查。

all.en: The translator they sent for the Japanese auditor was honestly excellent and made everything feel relaxed.
all.zh: 陪同日籍稽核員的翻譯人員真的很厲害，讓全程氛圍都很放鬆。

all.en: Be polite to the auditors even when they ask the same question for the third time in a row.
all.zh: 就算稽核員連問同一個問題三次，也要對他們保持禮貌。

all.en: Honestly, I learned more about my own department's procedures during prep than in the past two years.
all.zh: 老實說，光是準備稽核這段期間，我對自己部門程序的了解就比過去兩年還多。

all.en: I print out the readiness checklist every morning and cross off items as our team completes each one.
all.zh: 我每天早上會把準備檢查清單印出來，團隊完成一項就劃掉一項。

all.en: The daily debrief at five was honestly my favorite part because the snacks were really good.
all.zh: 老實說下午五點的當日匯報是我最愛的時段，因為點心真的好吃。

all.en: Don't forget to thank the support staff who organized the audit room and arranged everyone's meals.
all.zh: 別忘了感謝幫忙佈置稽核會議室與安排餐點的後勤同仁。
